> ⚠️ Public issues for security are appropriate ONLY for low-impact concerns
> (missing headers, hardening suggestions, configuration recommendations).
>
> If your finding could compromise users (auth bypass, data leak, RCE, IDOR,
> XSS with impact, voice fingerprint exfil, etc.), STOP and email
> security@matchmakers.cloud per the policy in SECURITY.md.
